# Gapless third-party notices

Release artifacts include this file, the component-specific notices in this
directory, the license texts shipped with Flutter plugins, and an SPDX SBOM.

## Auto-Editor 31.2.0

Auto-Editor is distributed under the Unlicense/public-domain dedication. The
bundled executable is recorded as an opaque, checksum-inventoried component in
the release SBOM; its upstream build contains multimedia libraries whose exact
license inventory remains the responsibility of that upstream release. Source is at
<https://github.com/WyattBlue/auto-editor/tree/31.2.0>.

## Instrument Sans

Instrument Sans is distributed under the SIL Open Font License 1.1. Its license
is included at `assets/fonts/OFL.txt`.

## Flutter and Dart dependencies

Package names, resolved versions, licenses, and source locations are recorded
in the SPDX SBOM generated for each release. No notice in this file changes the
terms of an included component.
